---
title:        "LangChain Chat with Tool Calling"
description:  Demonstrates using LangChain to enable the model to select and invoke tools/functions during a chat session.
date:         2025-01-05
image:        thumbnail.png
imagealt:     "A screenshot of the langchain-tool-calling template"
appurl:       https://posit-ai-langchain-tool-calling.share.connect.posit.cloud/
sourceurl:    https://github.com/posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/tree/main/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer/langchain-tool-calling
---

::: {.panel-tabset .shiny-mode-tabset  group="shiny-app-mode"}
## Express
``` bash
shiny create --template langchain-tool-calling --mode express --github posit-dev/py-shiny-templates/gen-ai/interactive-chat-explorer
```
:::

Demonstrates using LangChain to enable the model to select and invoke tools/functions during a chat session.

:::: {.grid .tags}

::: {.g-col-6}
**Components:**

* [Chat](/components/inputs/chat/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**Packages:**

* `langchain-core`
* `langchain-openai`
* `dotenv`
* `langchain`
:::

::::
